pet_notes: Create a side-by-side comparison build of the existing original chibi anime light cleric. Preserve the exact character identity: short wavy near-black plum bob with small side braid, amber eyes, charcoal and plum layered robes, ivory and soft-gold trim, star clasp, dark boots, gloves, compact full-body silhouette, no weapons or props. Repair only the five-frame hover/jumping row. Match White Kitsune's registration behavior: every hover frame must occupy the exact same practical height as idle, from top safe margin to bottom baseline. Use upright side-glance and robe-sway poses instead of crouching, jumping upward, or shrinking.
style_notes: Match the existing Twilight Cleric atlas exactly. Strict scale lock: identical head size, torso width, robe length, limb thickness, outline thickness, top margin, and planted-foot baseline in all five hover frames.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: Match the existing Twilight Cleric atlas exactly. Strict scale lock: identical head size, torso width, robe length, limb thickness, outline thickness, top margin, and planted-foot baseline in all five hover frames..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
